features: CITRUS FRESH: Sealapack Swing Bin Liners are lightly fragranced with a clean fresh lemon scent, perfect for summer months when bins fill and quickly become unpleasant. Use around the home, in bathrooms, bedrooms, lounge or the kitchen. Glass or sharp objects should be wrapped before being placed in the bin
QUICK, EASY TO CLOSE: When the bag is ready to replace, simply pull the bag handles together, securely tie and dispose in household wheelie bin
HOME, OFFICE, HOLIDAY: Use in the home, office or take a roll of bags on holiday, perfect for a self catering home, camping, sailing or in a campervan.

VEHICLE WASTE: Keep a roll of scented bags in your vehicle to place rubbish during a journey, useful to place a used nappy in or other unpleasant rubbish, tie the handles securely ready for when you are able to stop and properly dispose of the bag
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: ROLL OF 20 LEMON SCENTED BAGS
description: Sealapack Swing Bin Liners are lightly fragranced with a clean fresh lemon scent, perfect for summer months when bins fill and quickly become unpleasant. Use around the home, in bathrooms, bedrooms or the kitchen. Glass or sharp objects should be wrapped before being placed in the bin. When the bag is ready to replace, simply pull the bag handles together, securely tie and dispose in household wheelie bin. Use in the home, office or take a roll of bags on holiday, perfect for a self catering home, camping, sailing or in a campervan. Keep a roll of scented bags in your vehicle to place rubbish during a journey, useful to place a used nappy in or other unpleasant rubbish, tie the handles securely ready for when you are able to stop and properly dispose of the bag.
